features.name: Demo page renders call button
features.description: Render the demo home page and assert a 'Start Call' button is present in the DOM with correct accessible label and initial idle state

features.name: Call button idle state styles
features.description: Assert the call button displays correct idle styling (blue background, microphone icon) before any call is initiated

features.name: Call button connecting state
features.description: Mock Vapi SDK start() returning a pending promise; assert button transitions to 'Connecting...' text and disabled state while connecting

features.name: Call button active/in-call state
features.description: After mocking Vapi 'call-start' event, assert button shows 'End Call' with red styling and call timer begins incrementing

features.name: Call button ended state reset
features.description: Mock Vapi 'call-end' event and assert button returns to idle state, timer resets to 00:00, and no error banner is shown

features.name: Phone number input validation - valid E.164
features.description: Render the outbound call form, type '+15551234567', and assert no validation error is shown and submit button is enabled

features.name: Phone number input validation - invalid format
features.description: Type 'not-a-phone' into the phone input and assert an inline validation error message appears and submit remains disabled

features.name: Phone number input validation - empty submit
features.description: Submit the outbound call form with an empty phone number field and assert required field error appears without triggering API call

features.name: Phone number auto-formatting display
features.description: Type '5551234567' and assert the input display formats to '(555) 123-4567' while submitting the raw E.164 value

features.name: WebRTC connection mock - Vapi start called with assistant ID
features.description: Mock @vapi-ai/web Vapi class; click start call button and assert vapi.start() is called with the correct VAPI_PUBLIC_KEY and assistantId from env

features.name: Vapi SDK 'error' event handler shows error UI
features.description: Mock vapi.on('error') callback firing with a connection error; assert error toast or banner renders with the error message text

features.name: Vapi SDK 'message' event updates transcript display
features.description: Mock vapi.on('message') firing with a transcript message; assert the live transcript area renders the new message text in real-time

features.name: Vapi SDK 'speech-start' event shows speaking indicator
features.description: Mock vapi.on('speech-start') event; assert an animated speaking/wave indicator becomes visible on the demo UI

features.name: Vapi SDK 'speech-end' event hides speaking indicator
features.description: Trigger speech-start then speech-end events in sequence; assert the speaking indicator disappears after speech-end

features.name: Demo page feature cards render correctly
features.description: Render app/page.tsx and assert all three feature cards (Inbound Calls, Book Appointments, SMS Follow-ups) are present with correct heading text

features.name: System status link renders /api/health href
features.description: Render the home page and assert the system status anchor element has href='/api/health'

features.name: Dashboard link navigates to /dashboard
features.description: Render the home page and assert the 'Open Dashboard' anchor has href='/dashboard'

features.name: End call button calls vapi.stop()
features.description: After entering active call state, click the End Call button and assert vapi.stop() was called exactly once

features.name: Call status label accessibility
features.description: Assert call status text elements have appropriate aria-live='polite' regions so screen readers announce state changes

features.name: ErrorBoundary catches render errors
features.description: Wrap a component that throws in ErrorBoundary; assert fallback error UI renders instead of crashing the whole page

features.name: Webhook call.started creates DB record
features.description: POST a mock call.started payload to /api/webhooks/vapi route handler with a mocked supabaseAdmin; assert insert is called on voice_agent_calls with correct call_id and status='in-progress'

features.name: Webhook call.ended updates DB record to completed
features.description: POST call.ended event; mock supabaseAdmin.from().update(); assert update is called with status='completed', ended_at, and end_reason matching the endedReason field

features.name: Webhook HMAC signature validation rejects invalid sig
features.description: POST to /api/webhooks/vapi with x-vapi-signature set to an incorrect HMAC; assert 401 response with error='Invalid signature'

features.name: Webhook HMAC signature validation passes valid sig
features.description: Compute correct HMAC-SHA256 of the payload using VAPI_WEBHOOK_SECRET and include it in the header; assert 200 response with received:true

features.name: Webhook function-call bookAppointment routes correctly
features.description: POST function-call event with name='bookAppointment' and valid parameters; mock calcomClient.createBooking; assert the route returns the booking confirmation JSON

features.name: Webhook function-call sendSMS respects DNC list
features.description: Mock checkDNC to return true for the target number; POST sendSMS function-call; assert response includes error='Number is on Do Not Call list' and Twilio fetch is never called

features.name: Webhook transcript handler stores PII-redacted content
features.description: POST transcript event containing a phone number in the content; mock redactPII and supabaseAdmin; assert insert is called with the redacted content value

features.name: Webhook status-update syncs call status
features.description: POST status-update event with status='ended'; mock supabaseAdmin.update; assert update is called with correct status value for the matching call_id

features.name: lib/vapi.ts createAssistant method sends POST
features.description: Mock vapiClient.post; call createAssistant with a VapiAssistant object; assert POST is made to '/assistant' with the correct body and returns the created assistant

features.name: lib/vapi.ts startCall method sends POST with assistantId
features.description: Mock vapiClient.post; call startCall with assistantId, phoneNumberId, customerNumber; assert POST to '/call/phone' includes all required fields

features.name: lib/vapi.ts VapiError class properties
features.description: Instantiate VapiError with code, message, statusCode, details; assert all properties are accessible and name is 'VapiError'

features.name: lib/vapi.ts rate limit interceptor retries with backoff
features.description: Mock vapiClient to return 429 three times then succeed; assert the request is retried up to 3 times and eventually returns the successful response

features.name: Call state manager initial state is idle
features.description: Import or instantiate the call state hook/manager; assert initial state is 'idle' with no active call ID and duration of 0

features.name: Call state manager transitions on start
features.description: Call the start action on the state manager; assert state transitions from 'idle' to 'connecting' and stores the call session context

features.name: Webhook hang event marks call as failed
features.description: POST a hang event; mock supabaseAdmin.update; assert update is called with status='failed' and end_reason='hang_detected' for the call_id

features.name: Webhook speech-update event stores sentiment
features.description: POST a speech-update event with sentiment='positive'; mock supabaseAdmin.update; assert update is called with metadata containing lastSpeechUpdate and sentiment fields

features.name: Webhook blocked number skips call processing
features.description: Mock supabaseAdmin blocklist query to return a blocked number; POST call.started; assert call is inserted with status='blocked' and main contact lookup is not performed

features.name: Webhook caller ID lookup personalizes greeting
features.description: Mock contact lookup returning {name: 'Jane Smith'}; POST call.started; assert voice_agent_calls insert includes personalized_greeting='Hi Jane! Thanks for calling.'

features.name: Webhook call.ended voicemail detection sets is_voicemail flag
features.description: POST call.ended with endedReason='voicemail-detected'; assert update call includes is_voicemail=true

features.name: Webhook unknown event type returns received:true
features.description: POST webhook body with an unknown type; assert the handler returns 200 with received:true without throwing

features.name: POST /api/vapi/assistant creates assistant via Vapi API
features.description: Start a real HTTP test server wrapping the Next.js route handler; POST a valid VapiAssistant body; intercept the outbound Vapi API call with a local HTTP stub; assert 201 response with assistant id returned

features.name: GET /api/vapi/assistant lists assistants
features.description: Stub the Vapi API list endpoint with in-memory response; GET /api/vapi/assistant; assert 200 with array of assistant objects

features.name: POST /api/webhooks/vapi full call.started flow writes to Supabase
features.description: Boot a test HTTP server; POST call.started payload with valid HMAC; use a real Supabase in-memory table fixture; assert a row appears in voice_agent_calls with correct fields

features.name: POST /api/webhooks/vapi call.ended updates existing call row
features.description: Seed voice_agent_calls with an in-progress call; POST call.ended; assert the same call_id row is updated with status='completed' and duration_seconds populated

features.name: POST /api/calls/outbound validates required fields
features.description: POST to /api/calls/outbound without customerNumber; assert 400 response with error='customerNumber is required for outbound calls'

features.name: POST /api/calls/outbound initiates call and logs to Supabase
features.description: POST valid outbound payload; stub Vapi /call/phone with real local HTTP server returning call object; assert call is inserted into voice_agent_calls with direction='outbound' and status='queued'

features.name: POST /api/calls/outbound contact lookup generates whisper context
features.description: Seed voice_agent_contacts with a matching phone; POST outbound call without explicit whisperContext; assert response includes whisper_context_applied=true and whisper_fields is non-empty

features.name: POST /api/webhooks/vapi function-call bookAppointment integration
features.description: Run a local Cal.com API stub; POST function-call event with bookAppointment params; assert 200 with booking uid in response and voice_agent_bookings row inserted

features.name: POST /api/webhooks/vapi function-call bookAppointment conflict returns error
features.description: Cal.com stub returns BOOKING_CONFLICT error; POST bookAppointment function-call; assert response contains errorCode='BOOKING_CONFLICT' and no booking row is inserted

features.name: POST /api/webhooks/vapi function-call sendSMS sends via Twilio stub
features.description: Run local Twilio API stub; POST sendSMS function-call; assert stub received POST to /Messages.json with correct To/From/Body and voice_agent_sms_logs row inserted

features.name: Supabase voice_agent_calls table round-trip
features.description: Insert a call record directly via supabaseAdmin; query it back; assert all fields match including JSONB metadata field

features.name: Supabase voice_agent_transcripts stores per-call rows
features.description: Insert two transcript rows for the same call_id; query all transcripts for that call; assert two rows returned with correct role and content fields

features.name: Supabase voice_agent_bookings stores booking after call
features.description: Trigger bookAppointment integration flow; assert voice_agent_bookings contains a row with correct event_type_id, attendee_email, and status='confirmed'

features.name: Webhook idempotency - duplicate call.started events
features.description: POST the same call.started payload twice; assert only one row is inserted in voice_agent_calls (upsert or conflict handling prevents duplicate)

features.name: Inbound call rate limit blocks excess calls
features.description: Seed the rate limit state for a phone number to be at limit; POST call.started; assert the call is inserted with status='rate_limited' and logInboundRateLimitHit is triggered

features.name: SMS opt-out flag prevents sendSMS
features.description: Seed voice_agent_contacts with opt_out_sms=true; POST sendSMS function-call for that number; assert response error='Contact has opted out of SMS' and no Twilio request made

features.name: POST /api/webhooks/vapi lookupContact returns contact data
features.description: Seed a contact in voice_agent_contacts; POST function-call lookupContact with that phone; assert response contains found:true and contact name/email

features.name: POST /api/webhooks/vapi lookupContact unknown phone
features.description: POST lookupContact with a phone number not in the DB; assert response contains found:false and contact:null

features.name: POST /api/webhooks/vapi invalid JSON body returns 500
features.description: POST malformed JSON body to the webhook handler; assert 500 response with error message

features.name: Outbound call whisper overrides applied to Vapi start payload
features.description: Seed a contact with name and company; POST outbound call for that number; capture the Vapi /call/phone request body via stub; assert assistantOverrides includes whisper context metadata

features.name: E2E: Navigate to demo page and assert heading visible
features.description: Playwright: navigate to localhost:3000; assert h1 'Voice AI Agent' is visible; assert page title contains 'Voice AI Agent'

features.name: E2E: Start call button visible on demo page
features.description: Playwright: navigate to demo page; assert a button with text matching /start call/i is visible and not disabled before any interaction

features.name: E2E: Click start call button transitions to connecting state
features.description: Playwright: intercept Vapi WebRTC; click Start Call; assert button text changes to 'Connecting...' and is disabled within 500ms

features.name: E2E: Active call shows end button and timer
features.description: Playwright: mock Vapi SDK to immediately fire call-start; assert End Call button appears and a timer element is visible and incrementing

features.name: E2E: Click end call returns to idle state
features.description: Playwright: after entering active call state via mock, click End Call; assert button returns to 'Start Call' label and timer resets to 00:00

features.name: E2E: Phone number input form visible on demo page
features.description: Playwright: assert the outbound call phone number form section is visible with a labeled text input and submit button

features.name: E2E: Phone form invalid input shows validation error
features.description: Playwright: type 'abc123' into phone input field, click submit; assert a validation error message appears below the input

features.name: E2E: Phone form valid submission triggers outbound call
features.description: Playwright: intercept POST /api/calls/outbound and return 201; type '+15551234567'; click Request Call; assert request is made and success state UI appears

features.name: E2E: Outbound call API error shows user-facing error message
features.description: Playwright: intercept /api/calls/outbound and return 500; submit valid phone number; assert an error message is shown to the user (not a raw exception)

features.name: E2E: Call status updates live during active call
features.description: Playwright: mock Vapi message event to fire with a transcript string; assert the demo UI displays the transcript text in a live-transcript element within 1 second

features.name: E2E: Dashboard link navigates to /dashboard
features.description: Playwright: click 'Open Dashboard' button on home page; assert URL changes to /dashboard and the dashboard page loads without error

features.name: E2E: /api/health endpoint returns 200
features.description: Playwright: navigate to /api/health; assert response status is 200 and body contains a status field

features.name: E2E: Demo page is responsive on mobile viewport
features.description: Playwright: set viewport to 375x812 (iPhone 14); navigate to demo page; assert the call button and phone form are visible and not obscured in mobile layout

features.name: E2E: Keyboard navigation reaches call button
features.description: Playwright: tab through the page starting from body; assert focus reaches the Start Call button and pressing Enter triggers the call flow

features.name: E2E: Demo page loads without console errors
features.description: Playwright: navigate to demo page; listen for console error events; assert no JavaScript errors are emitted during page load and initial render
